stemHtml:
The captain of an aircraft is a native English speaker and due to his confidence uses improper call-outs during flight that do not coincide with the call-outs deescribed in the SOPs. During the debriefing the first officer expresses his difficulty to recognize the call-outs during flight by saying the following:

'Captain, we had a very smooth flight. However, I want to address an issue with communication. You were using call-outs we did not learn during flight training. I was even confused at one moment.'

This scenario is an example of...
